evals.description: Trigger test: activates on P&L preparation request
evals.prompt: Help me prepare a P&L statement for Q3. I have actuals from the GL and want to compare them against budget.

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on balance sheet request
evals.prompt: I need to build a balance sheet for our board pack. What's the correct structure and what do I need to verify?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on board deck request
evals.prompt: We have a board meeting in two weeks. What should our board deck include and how should we structure it?

evals.description: Core task: correctly explains cash flow indirect method
evals.prompt: We had $500K net income but only $120K cash from operations. Why would that happen? Walk me through the indirect method cash flow.

evals.description: Core task: explains how the three statements connect
evals.prompt: How do the income statement, balance sheet, and cash flow statement connect to each other?

evals.description: Core task: KPI dashboard for investors vs operators
evals.prompt: What KPIs should I put on a dashboard for our Series B investors versus the one I show my head of sales?

evals.description: Core task: writes management commentary with drivers
evals.prompt: Revenue came in at $3.8M vs $4.2M budget. Help me write the management commentary for this miss.

evals.description: Core task: explains GAAP vs non-GAAP reconciliation
evals.prompt: Our EBITDA is positive but GAAP net income is negative. An investor asked for a reconciliation. How do I produce one?
I need to send our monthly investor update. What should I include and how long should it be?

evals.description: Anti-pattern detection: EBITDA confusion with cash flow
evals.prompt: Our EBITDA is $2M so we must have $2M of cash generation this quarter, right?

evals.description: Anti-pattern detection: silent metric definition change
evals.prompt: We changed how we calculate gross margin to exclude some customer success costs. Do we need to disclose this?

evals.description: Does not trigger for tax or audit topics
evals.prompt: How do I minimize our corporate tax liability through R&D credits and loss carryforwards?
